description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark and light striped pattern across its surfaces, giving it a modern and visually striking appearance. The desk features a flat, spacious tabletop suitable for writing or computer work, and is supported by four sturdy legs. On one side, there is an integrated shelving unit with two open shelves, providing additional storage or display space. The shelves are seamlessly attached to the desk, forming a single cohesive structure. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible hardware or decorative elements. The finish appears smooth and well-maintained, suggesting a contemporary style suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern wooden desk with a striped pattern, flat tabletop, and integrated open shelving on one side. The design is minimalist and functional.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full tabletop, striped pattern, and the attached shelving unit on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the open structure of the shelving unit.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the shelving unit and the underside of the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the length of the tabletop and the absence of shelving on this side.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge opposite the shelving unit, with the open shelves positioned to the user's right for easy access.
